gates.name: nfl_fair_line_review_safe
reasons: NFL fair-line review is research-only and execution-disabled.

next_action: Fill exact Kalshi ticker, official terms, clean timing status, and executable cost for one selected NFL row; write matching contract-mapping and calibrated-probability overlays under /home/mrwatson/manual_drops/kalshi_ev_contract_mappings/ and /home/mrwatson/manual_drops/kalshi_ev_probabilities/, then rerun overlay preflight and the EV ledger.

selection_policy.purpose: Bridge a model repo that has calibrated probabilities but no exact Kalshi contract mapping. This is a mapping assignment, not an EV claim.
requires_before_evidence: official Kalshi resolution terms from a local snapshot
executable price or all-in cost basis
matching calibrated-probability overlay keyed by the exact ticker and side
sort: larger absolute model-vs-consensus probability delta first
home and away moneyline sides emitted separately
